module.name: agent
module.purpose: Agent crate namespace for model/session/task/prompt orchestration. It carries host System metadata through SessionContext from preview handling into initial prompt rendering, alongside task previews and tool previews, while prompt rendering supports conditional template branches.

childModules.name: model
childModules.purpose: Owns agent model backend traits, request/response data, backend errors, and the implemented Deepseek streaming backend. DeepseekBackend loads its config and issues streaming Deepseek chat-completions requests with a provider-supported user-role single-message payload preserving request.prompt as content.

childModules.name: prompt
childModules.purpose: Defines the agent prompt interface, render_template conditional/variable rendering, and InitialPrompt variables for System, Context, NoPreviewTask, and Tools.

childModules.name: session
childModules.purpose: Owns Session startup/routing behavior and SessionContext storage for host System metadata, task previews, and tool previews gathered from execution Preview events.

childModules.name: task
childModules.purpose: Owns the task runtime and initial model-step prompt rendering from a cloned SessionContext that preserves system, task, and tool preview data.
